name: agent-evolution-os
description: Auditable self-evolution governance for long-running AI agents.

scripts.self-test: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && mkdir -p $tmp/bin && cp bin/evolution-review.js $tmp/bin/evolution-review.js && cd $tmp && node bin/evolution-review.js --self-test
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run self-test && npm run check:plugin
